Bus Timings

Detailed Info on Al Nahda 19A Street 1 Bus Stop in Dubai

September 23, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

The Al Nahda, 19A Street 1 Bus Stop is a crucial transit point located in the lively Al Nahda area of Dubai. Serving a diverse range of passengers, this stop is well-positioned to provide easy access to a variety of local amenities, including shopping malls, dining options, healthcare facilities, and accommodations. Whether you are a local resident or a visitor exploring the city, this bus stop offers a convenient gateway to various destinations across Dubai.

Address

Al Nahda 2 Dubai United Arab Emirates

Maps

View Google Directions here.

Located in the bustling Al Nahda area of Dubai, the Al Nahda, 19A Street 1 Bus Stop is a central fixture in the city’s public transportation system. This stop is strategically connected to multiple bus routes, facilitating easy travel across Dubai.

Bus Routes and Timings

The Al Nahda, 19A Street 1 Bus Stop is well-serviced by a variety of bus routes, providing frequent departures throughout the day to key destinations across Dubai:

Bus Route Destination Timings
22 Deira City Center Bus Stn - Al Nahda 1 Starting at 05:00 AM, with departures every 30 minutes until 08:00 PM
24 Al Nahda 2 - Dubai Festival City Starting at 05:15 AM, with departures every 30 minutes until 08:15 PM
F08 Dubai Festival City - Al Nahda 2 Starting at 05:30 AM, with departures every 30 minutes until 08:30 PM
X13 Lulu Village - Al Satwa Bus Stn Starting at 05:45 AM, with departures every 30 minutes until 08:45 PM

Bus Route Details

  • 22 Route: This route connects Al Nahda with Deira City Center Bus Station and Al Nahda 1. Buses commence service at 05:00 AM, running approximately every 30 minutes until the last bus at 08:00 PM. It provides a crucial link for commuters traveling between Al Nahda and Deira City Center.

  • 24 Route: The 24 route links Al Nahda 2 with Dubai Festival City, starting from 05:15 AM and operating with 30-minute intervals throughout the day, concluding at 08:15 PM.
  • F08 Route: Connecting Dubai Festival City with Al Nahda 2, this route begins service at 05:30 AM and operates every 30 minutes until 08:30 PM. It offers a reliable option for passengers traveling between these two key areas.
  • X13 Route: Running from Lulu Village to Al Satwa Bus Station, the X13 route starts at 05:45 AM and runs at 30-minute intervals until 08:45 PM. This route serves those traveling across various central locations within Dubai.

Nearby Destinations

The bus stop’s location offers easy access to a range of amenities, including:

Cafeterias and Restaurants

  • Pour Fouad Restaurant: Enjoy a diverse menu of Middle Eastern dishes.

  • Saif Restaurant Deccan Darbar Al Nahda: Known for its authentic Indian cuisine.
  • Palm Valley Restaurant: A great spot for relaxed dining with a variety of options.
  • Food Village Restaurant: Offers a wide range of international food choices.
  • Burger Club Restaurant: Perfect for gourmet burgers and casual dining.
  • Pak Darbar Restaurant: Renowned for its Pakistani specialties.
  • It’s Malabar Restaurant: Offers traditional South Indian fare.
  • Chili’s Restaurant: Popular for its American-style comfort food.
  • Calicut Chef Restaurant: Known for its flavorful South Indian dishes.
  • Grill Hut Restaurant: Ideal for grilled meats and casual meals.
  • Miya Bhai Restaurant: Offers a range of Indian and Pakistani dishes.
  • McDonald’s Restaurant: Convenient for quick bites and familiar fast food.
  • Hot Time Restaurant: Offers a variety of international dishes.
  • Biggy African Restaurant: Features African cuisine.
  • Madras Vegetarian Restaurant: Known for its extensive vegetarian menu.
  • Donaza Restaurant: Offers a range of Middle Eastern and Mediterranean dishes.

Landmarks

  • Pristine Private School: An educational institution in the vicinity.

  • Al Marri 5 Building: A notable residential building nearby.
  • R S Residence By SBK: Provides housing options close to the bus stop.
  • Bin Huraiz Building 1: Another key residential building in the area.
  • Al Falasi Building: Prominent in the local landscape.
  • Al Jabri Towers 2: A significant building in the Al Nahda area.
  • Park Two: A local park for recreation and relaxation.
  • JMS Building: Known for its commercial and residential spaces.
  • Khalifa Daboos Building: A notable landmark nearby.
Recommended Guides

Shopping Centres

  • Authentic Store LLC Shopping Mall: Offers a variety of retail options.

  • Mammooss Nahda Shopping Mall: A popular local shopping destination.
  • Taxi Stand Sahara Centre Dubai Shopping Mall: Convenient for catching taxis and shopping.
  • Daiso Japan Shopping Mall: Known for its wide range of products at affordable prices.
  • Toysrus Sahara Mall Shopping Mall: Great for toys and children’s products.
  • Yas Perfumes Shopping Mall: Specializes in a range of fragrances.
  • Unif Unique Gents Salon Shopping Mall: Offers grooming services.
  • Areej Shopping Centre Shopping Mall: Known for its diverse shopping options.
  • Lee Cooper Shopping Mall: Features fashionable clothing and accessories.
  • Barber Shop Shopping Mall: Provides haircuts and grooming services.

Healthcare Facilities

  • Eatemad Home Health Care: Offers various home healthcare services.

  • IMARA Healthcare UAE: Provides comprehensive medical care.
  • Oxygen Healthcare Centre: Specializes in respiratory and general healthcare.
  • Holistic Healthcare LLC: Known for alternative and holistic treatments.
  • Medex Healthcare: Offers a wide range of medical services.
  • Miracle Home Healthcare: Provides personalized home healthcare services.

Pharmacies

  • Aster Pharmacy 200: Well-stocked for all pharmaceutical needs.

  • Novo Nahda Sahara Pharmacy: Offers a range of medications and health products.
  • Alexandria Pharmacy: Known for its extensive selection of medicines.
  • Abraj Sahara Pharmacy: Provides various health and wellness products.
  • Bio Vista Pharmacy: Offers pharmaceuticals and healthcare supplies.
  • Life Pharmacy Life Al Nahda: Known for its broad range of health products.
  • Aster Pharmacy 118: Provides comprehensive pharmaceutical services.
  • Aster Grand Nahda Pharmacy: Offers a range of medications and health products.

Accommodations

  • Emirates Star Hotel Apartments Dubai: Provides comfortable lodging options.

  • Lavender Hotel Apartments Al-Nahda: Ideal for extended stays and business travelers.
  • Samaya Apartments: Offers convenient accommodation for travelers.
  • Nawras Hotel Apartments: Known for its excellent service and amenities.
  • Golden Crown Hotel Apartments: Provides a range of amenities for short and long stays.

Nearby Stops

  1. Al Nahda, 19A Street 2(133m): 22

  2. Desert Group Building 4(161m): F21

  3. Al Nahda, Al Ameen Private School(303m): 22

  4. Al Shawi Tower(342m): F21

  5. Al Nahda, Park 1(399m): 22, F21

The Al Nahda, 19A Street 1 Bus Stop is more than just a transit hub; it is a pivotal point in a vibrant area of Dubai. Its strategic location, accessibility features, and proximity to essential services and local attractions make it an important stop for both daily commuters and visitors. Whether you’re heading to work, shopping, or exploring the local area, this bus stop offers a convenient and efficient way to navigate Dubai.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: September 23, 2025.
